news.summary: New renders offer a closer look at Apple’s planned AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience powered and standalone Siri app.

news.title: Rivian under investigation over rear suspension failures on R1 models
news.summary: At least two owners have lost control of their vehicles after a critical suspension component broke. In both cases, the vehicles had been previously serviced.

news.summary: Enterprise AI is entering a different phase now, one where enterprises are no longer evaluating whether AI is exciting. They are evaluating whether it is safe to deploy broadly.

news.summary: The update signals YouTube's ongoing efforts to compete with other platforms for podcast audiences.

news.title: Waymo to begin passenger rides in its new Ojai robotaxi
news.summary: After several months of testing, Waymo is finally ready to invite non-employee passengers into its newest vehicle, the Zeekr RT minivan, which has been rebranded as Ojai. news.title: These new iOS 27 renders hint at Siri’s big redesign

news.title: CNN sues Perplexity over ‘verbatim’ copycat articles
news.summary: CNN has filed a lawsuit against Perplexity, claiming that the startup's AI tools generate "verbatim" copies of its work, as reported earlier by CNN.
